confidence_rationale: Completion time clearly observable, but precise measurement of cutting deviations limited by camera angle and foam material visibility. Pattern appears to be on foam rather than suspended gauze as specified in task definition.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation measurements at all 8 cardinal points due to camera angle
Whether material is suspended gauze or foam dome - appears to be foam-based cutting exercise
technique_summary: Excellent speed with expert-level completion time of 21 seconds. Clean circular cutting technique with minor precision issues. Performance suggests high skill level despite minor deviations from marked line.
strengths: Very fast completion time well within expert range
Complete circular cut with good overall technique
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining closer adherence to marked cutting line
Ensure smoother, more consistent cut line throughout circle perimeter
